mapper.select: select distinct p.permission_name from tb_user u join tb_role r on JSON_CONTAINS(u.role, CAST(r.id AS CHAR )) join tb_permission p on JSON_CONTAINS(r.permissions, CAST(p.id AS CHAR )) where u.id = #{userId} and u.status = 1
select username from tb_user where id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_user set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, sex = #{sex}, name = #{name}, tel = #{tel}, email = #{email}, hiredate = #{hiredate}, role = #{role}, root = false,
dept_id = #{deptId},
status = #{status}, create_time = NOW()
mapper.select: select id, username, sex, name, tel, email, hiredate, role, dept_id as deptId, root, status from tb_user where id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update tb_user set status = 2 where id = #{id} and root = false
